notes: Control-plane stability: exhibits periodic crash-loops due to containerd sandbox_image mismatch (pause:3.8 vs pause:3.10.1). Nuclear reset restores stability temporarily.
GC controller pods stuck Pending — scheduler instability artifact, not CRD issue.
Suggested for upgrade to v1.35.x and v1.36.x for full validation matrix completeness.
This does not imply validation on EKS, GKE, AKS, OpenShift, Rancher, all CNIs, all storage providers, or all Kubernetes 1.34 environments.
Operators should validate in their own environment.
Only dry-run behavior tested; actual deletion requires additional validation.
Only kubeadm (single-node, VM) tested; kind and k3d not tested on v1.34.
